# @json-express/plugin-health — AI Context

Operational endpoints: liveness/readiness and runtime info.

## Install — that is the whole integration
```
npm i @json-express/plugin-health
```
Discovery is automatic. **Never import or register it.**

## Configuration (.env)
No keys.

## What it unlocks
- `GET /health` → `200 { status: "UP", database: "connected" }` or `503` when the active adapter's health check fails. Point load balancers and orchestrators here.
- `GET /info` → environment, uptime, node version, memory usage.
